creator: kargl@troutmask.apl.washington.edu
text:
* Fix the port so that it will install

* Added a patch to fix several buffer overflow problems.

* NO, I do not want to be the maintainer.

* This also close PR bin/15471 (unless some one wants to apply
  the patches to FreeBSD-stable.)

How-To-Repeat: 
cd ports/devel/fortran-utils
make install

See  PR bin/15471 about the buffer over flow problems
